mapper.select: SELECT trait_name AS traitName, trait_desc AS traitDesc, effect_type AS effectType, effect_value AS effectValue, troop_restrict AS troopRestrict, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM general_famous_trait WHERE general_template_id = #{generalTemplateId} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT t.trait_name AS traitName, t.trait_desc AS traitDesc, t.effect_type AS effectType, t.effect_value AS effectValue, t.troop_restrict AS troopRestrict, t.sort_order AS sortOrder FROM general_famous_trait t INNER JOIN general_template gt ON t.general_template_id = gt.id WHERE gt.name = #{name} ORDER BY t.sort_order
